_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Service focus involves overseeing the whole service life cycle, including the design, development, deployment and operation of a service.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of IT service management principles as applied to data services, including service catalog design, service level management, incident and problem management, and continual service improvement.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-K-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-A-002 (OP, cosine: 0.386), AI-T-008 (AI, cosine: 0.351).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.5/10 (raw 0.447). Shared vocabulary: [design, service]. DDaT-only terms [cycle, deployment, development, focus, involves, life] vs WIDAI-only terms [applied, catalog, continual, data, improvement, incident] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.887, R=0.868). Balanced P/R — the 19-word DDaT element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Service focus involves overseeing the whole service life cycle, including the de" and "Knowledge of IT service management principles as applied to data services, inclu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.490 ≈ STS 0.447 (gap 0.043). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [design, service] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.1%. Shared tokens: [design, service]. DDaT-only: [cycle, deployment, development, focus, involves, life]. WIDAI-only: [applied, catalog, continual, data, improvement, incident].
